name: Task Templates
purpose: Reusable internal task templates for follow-up, document collection, review triage, and partner enablement.

boundary.public_safe_summary: Internal routing helpers for funding readiness operations. Use only behind API/server logic.

safety_rules: Do not import this file from browser-facing pages or public widgets.
All names, queues, tags, and workflow references are demo-safe placeholders.
No provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, payout terms, private contacts, borrower PII, credentials, or underwriting notes are included.
Outputs must be treated as readiness routing guidance, not a funding decision, funding offer, or outcome promise.

task_templates.title: Call high-readiness lead
task_templates.task_body: Review scorecard answers, confirm consent, and contact the lead about a strategy review. Do not imply a funding decision or funding outcome.
completion_checklist: Reviewed score, tier, use case, and caution flags.
Explained next step as human review, subject to documentation.
Logged summary without private underwriting conclusions.

task_templates.title: Review scorecard file
task_templates.task_body: Assess scorecard data for readiness gaps, missing context, and document needs.

task_templates.title: Request readiness documents
task_templates.task_body: Send the relevant document checklist based on funding purpose and score tier.

task_templates.title: Review caution flags
task_templates.task_body: Review severe caution flags and decide whether a safe educational response or additional human review is appropriate.
completion_checklist: Confirmed the flag is not a simple input error.
Avoided legal, tax, credit repair, or lending advice.
Routed to safe response or review queue.
Documented the reason using neutral wording.

task_templates.title: Send prep-first nurture check-in
task_templates.task_body: Send educational readiness guidance and invite the lead to retake the scorecard after improvements.
completion_checklist: Matched nurture path to primary gap.

task_templates.title: Prepare funding path summary
task_templates.task_body: Prepare an internal summary of likely funding families without naming providers or exposing routing logic.
completion_checklist: Matched use case to broad funding family.
Listed documents needed to confirm readiness.
Flagged gaps and safe next step.

task_templates.title: Follow up on abandoned scorecard
task_templates.task_body: Remind the lead to complete the scorecard and explain that the result is educational readiness guidance.
completion_checklist: Avoided urgency manipulation or funding promises.

task_templates.title: Send partner embed demo
task_templates.task_body: Send public-safe embed instructions and explain partner boundaries.
completion_checklist: Confirmed no provider names or private routing rules are exposed.
